endpoints.name: Search capacity reservations in time range
endpoints.description:
Get information on all capacity reservations made to scheduled delivery windows in a given time range.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns time adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

> Note that the combined string `carrier@{capacityType}@{shippingPolicyId}` can be referred to as a "resource" in the API's messages.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{CAPACITYTYPE}} with a real capacitytype. Replace {{SHIPPINGPOLICYID}} with a real shippingpolicyid.

endpoints.name: Get capacity reservation usage by window
endpoints.description:
Retrieves capacity usage of a specific scheduled delivery reservation window.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns time adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

> Note that the combined string `carrier@{capacityType}@{shippingPolicyId}` can be referred to as a "resource" in the API's messages.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{CAPACITYTYPE}} with a real capacitytype. Replace {{WINDOWDAY}} with a real windowday. Replace {{SHIPPINGPOLICYID}} with a real shippingpolicyid. Replace {{WINDOWENDTIME}} with a real windowendtime. Replace {{WINDOWSTARTTIME}} with a real windowstarttime.

endpoints.name: Retrieve blocked delivery windows
endpoints.description:
Lists all blocked delivery windows of your store's shipping policies, searching by carrier ID.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{CARRIERID}} with a real carrierid.

endpoints.name: List all  docks
endpoints.description: Informs a list of all docks.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create/update dock
endpoints.description: Creates or updates docks to be used in your logistic operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: List dock by ID
endpoints.description: Informs a given dock's information, searching by dock ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{DOCKID}} with a real dockid.

endpoints.name: Delete dock
endpoints.description: Deletes dock by dock ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{DOCKID}} with a real dockid.

endpoints.name: Activate dock
endpoints.description: Activates dock through dock ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{DOCKID}} with a real dockid.

endpoints.name: Deactivate dock
endpoints.description: Deactivate dock by dock ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{DOCKID}} with a real dockid.

endpoints.name: Create/update freight values
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the freight values of your store's carriers. Learn more in [Shipping rate template](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/planilha-de-frete--tutorials_127#).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{CARRIERID}} with a real carrierid.

endpoints.name: List freight values
endpoints.description: Lists freight values apointed to your store's carriers, searching by carrier ID and postal code (`cep`).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{CARRIERID}} with a real carrierid. Replace {{CEP}} with a real cep.

endpoints.name: List paged polygons
endpoints.description: Lists stored polygons.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create/update polygon
endpoints.description: Creates or updates your store's polygons by geoshape coordinates and polygon name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: List polygon by ID
endpoints.description: Lists your store's polygons by searching through polygon name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{POLYGONNAME}} with a real polygonname.

endpoints.name: Delete polygon
endpoints.description: Deletes polygon set up in your store, by polygon name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{POLYGONNAME}} with a real polygonname.

endpoints.name: List all holidays
endpoints.description: Lists information of all holidays.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: List holiday by ID
endpoints.description: Lists holiday's information by holiday ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{HOLIDAYID}} with a real holidayid.

endpoints.name: Create/update holiday
endpoints.description: Creates or updates holidays through holiday ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{HOLIDAYID}} with a real holidayid.

endpoints.name: Delete holiday
endpoints.description: Deletes given holidays set up in your store.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{HOLIDAYID}} with a real holidayid.

endpoints.name: List all pickup points
endpoints.description: Lists all of your store's pickup points.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: List paged Pickup Points
endpoints.description: Lists paged pickup points in your store.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: List Pickup Point By ID
endpoints.description: Lists your store's pickup points while searching by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{PICKUPPOINTID}} with a real pickuppointid.

endpoints.name: Create/Update Pickup Point
endpoints.description: Creates or updates [pickup points](https://help.vtex.com/en/subcategory/pickup-points--1c5Btie9ou2Gg2iUo0ggqM#) in your store by Pickup Point ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{PICKUPPOINTID}} with a real pickuppointid.

endpoints.name: Delete Pickup Point
endpoints.description: Deletes a given pickup point for your store, by pickup point ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{PICKUPPOINTID}} with a real pickuppointid.

endpoints.name: List all warehouses
endpoints.description: Lists information about all warehouses set up in your store.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create/update warehouse
endpoints.description: Creates or updates your store's warehouses
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: List warehouse by ID
endpoints.description: Lists the information of a given warehouse, searching by warehouse ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid.

endpoints.name: Remove warehouse
endpoints.description: Deletes given warehouse by warehouse ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid.

endpoints.name: Activate warehouse
endpoints.description: Activates a given warehouse, by warehouse ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid.

endpoints.name: Deactivate warehouse
endpoints.description: Deactivates a given warehouse by warehouse ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid.

endpoints.name: List inventory with dispatched reservations
endpoints.description: Lists inventory with dispatched reservations. When the number of active reservations is more than 2000 the return is an error with status code 400 (BadRequest) and the message: Too many active reservations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid. Replace {{ITEMID}} with a real itemid.

endpoints.name: List inventory per dock
endpoints.description: Lists inventory information per dock set up in your store.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid. Replace {{DOCKID}} with a real dockid.

endpoints.name: List inventory per dock and warehouse
endpoints.description: Lists information of inventory per dock and warehouse.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid. Replace {{DOCKID}} with a real dockid.

endpoints.name: List inventory per warehouse
endpoints.description: Lists inventory information per warehouse on your store.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: List supply lots
endpoints.description: Returns a list of the supply lots of an SKU in a specific warehouse.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: Save supply lot
endpoints.description:
Creates a new Supply Lot. A Supply Lot lets the store sell products that are not currently available in stock but whose arrival is already scheduled.

Check out our [documentation](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/setting-up-future-inventory--UMSGjooqRfkRbeoh94kS4) about this feature.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{SUPPLYLOTID}} with a real supplylotid. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: Transfer supply lot
endpoints.description:
Transfers an SKU from a Supply Lot to the currently available inventory.

Check out how this transfer works in further detail by reading our [documentation](https://help.vtex.com/pt/tutorial/configurar-estoque-futuro--UMSGjooqRfkRbeoh94kS4) about this feature.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{SUPPLYLOTID}} with a real supplylotid. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: Create reservation
endpoints.description: Creates [reservation](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/how-does-reservation-work--tutorials_92).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: List reservation by ID
endpoints.description: Lists reservation's information by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RESERVATIONID}} with a real reservationid.

endpoints.name: Acknowledgment reservation
endpoints.description: Acknowledges reservations made by reservation ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RESERVATIONID}} with a real reservationid.

endpoints.name: Cancel reservation
endpoints.description: Cancels reservation by reservation ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RESERVATIONID}} with a real reservationid.

endpoints.name: Confirm reservation
endpoints.description: Confirms reservation by reservation ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RESERVATIONID}} with a real reservationid.

endpoints.name: List reservation by warehouse and SKU
endpoints.description: Lists reservations in your store, by searching through warehouse and SKU.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: List inventory by SKU
endpoints.description: Lists your store's inventory by SKU ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: Update inventory by SKU and warehouse
endpoints.description: Updates inventory for a given SKU and warehouse.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{WAREHOUSEID}} with a real warehouseid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: List shipping policies
endpoints.description:
This endpoint lists existing shipping policies from carriers in your store.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create shipping policy
endpoints.description:
This endpoint creates new shipping policies from carriers in your store.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Retrieve shipping policy by ID
endpoints.description:
This endpoint lists existing [shipping policies](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/shipping-policy--tutorials_140) from carriers in your store, searching by their IDs.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update shipping policy
endpoints.description:
This endpoint updates information on existing Shipping Policies from carriers.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete shipping policies by ID
endpoints.description: This endpoint deletes existing shipping policies from carriers in your store, searching by their IDs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Calculate SLA
endpoints.description:
Endpoint used by the checkout to calculate the Service Level Agreement (SLA), a contract between the store and shoppers on the order's fulfillment conditions, such as the shipping estimated date. 

The calculation of the estimated date considers the [shipping policy](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/shipping-policy--tutorials_140) and [loading dock](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/loading-dock--5DY8xHEjOLYDVL41Urd5qj) related to the order.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.
